description: Maps VALOUR pilot evidence outcome signals to artefact generator limb repositories. This is the machine-readable integration contract seed for Release 0.3. No live API calls are wired yet.

ea-artefact-generator.label: EA Artefact Generator
ea-artefact-generator.description: Generates enterprise architecture artefacts: governance briefs, architecture decision records, executive summaries, risk analysis, trade-off analysis, and delivery backlog.

sa-artefact-generator.label: SA Artefact Generator
sa-artefact-generator.description: Generates solution architecture artefacts: solution overview, architecture decision records, interface register, trade-off matrix, dependency map, and risk register.

ba-artefact-generator.label: BA Artefact Generator

endpoints.description: Generate BA artefact from context — contract not yet documented for external consumption

apiContract.notes: Most integration-ready limb in Release 0.3. Recommended first live integration candidate for Release 0.4.

ba-artefact-generator.description: Generates business analysis and business architecture artefacts: stakeholder maps, requirements, process models, capability views, traceability matrices, user stories, decision records, and delivery handoff packs.

pm-artefact-generator.label: PM Artefact Generator
pm-artefact-generator.description: Generates project and programme management artefacts: project initiation, RAID log, steering committee reporting, and integrated delivery planning.

pmi-portal.label: PMI Portal
pmi-portal.description: Governed delivery workspace: client mandate intake, architecture framing, scale assessment, artefact catalogue, governance model, RAID and decisions, milestones, executive snapshot, client visibility, and handover pack.

mappings.description: Pilot evidence shows architecture decision clarity as the primary leadership gap — user needs help framing decisions for board or governance audiences.
Pilot evidence shows translation gap — user understands the technical position but cannot frame it in executive or financial language for senior stakeholders.
Pilot evidence surfaces delivery risk, action items, or accountability gaps that need formal tracking and governance.
Pilot evidence shows the user needs to clarify business requirements, stakeholder intent, or process scope before the technical solution can be properly governed.
Pilot evidence shows a programme or portfolio communication gap — the user needs structured executive reporting, client visibility, or programme governance artefacts.
Pilot evidence shows a confidence improvement that can be operationalised. The specific artefact type depends on the scenario. All limbs are potential candidates.
mappings.notes: Route to the limb matching the scenario type, not the signal alone.
